name: Java Lava Coffee Liqueur
description: A premium cold-brew liqueur blending ethically sourced Arabica beans with Caribbean rum and blue agave. Bold enough for cocktails, smooth enough to sip neat. 750ml · 20% ABV (40 Proof). Flavor: Roast · Spice · Earth.
additionalInfoDescription1: Roasted Arabica and dark cocoa on the nose; a velvety palate of espresso, warm spice and earthy agave with a long, gently sweet finish.
additionalInfoDescription2: Ethically sourced Arabica coffee, Caribbean rum, blue agave. 20% ABV (40 proof).
additionalInfoDescription3: Neat over a large rock, in an espresso martini, or floated over cold brew with cream.
